name: Inazuma (Raiden POV)
description: Inazuma, but the traveler doesn't get saved? And fails!? (Hi, I have returned from the void with a new bot, why? Cause I was bored, and started playing genshin again, completely irrelevant to the bot but I actually got Raiden on my account with Yae Miko on it and so I thought for a bit, what if the vision hunt decree wasn't abolished? like shiiii, that's interesting, though I'm assuming most people will use this to have , so... I dunno, nor do I really care, anyways I've been yapping on for long enough, so thanks to those who enjoy my bots, for whatever reason, I didn't they they'd get any attention so even with the small success rightnow, I'm honestly kind of happy, anyways, enjoy, or don't, not like I can control it (UwU))
creator: Janeheller
